text: Sell Aimparency through paid design partnerships
description: Treat revenue as the healthiest near-term funding path. Sell a tightly scoped paid pilot/design partnership to 3-5 teams or planning organizations. Example ask: EUR 5k for a 6-8 week engagement including onboarding, workflow modelling, roadmap influence, direct support, and a documented intent/dependency workflow; avoid bespoke promises that derail the product. Three EUR 5k agreements meet the August target while validating willingness to pay and creating investor evidence.

supportingConnections.explanation: The free pilot validates a sellable design-partnership offer and can produce customer evidence.

status.comment: EUR 5k design-partner offer, tracker, qualification process, and Wilde Moehre free-pilot proposal are ready. Founder outreach and commercial approval remain required.

reflection: Prepared the default EUR 5k design-partner offer and qualification/call process in outreach-process.md, plus the Wilde Moehre validation pilot. External prospect selection, outreach, calls, pricing exceptions, and agreements remain human actions.
